mapper.select: /* com.educare.edu.comn.mapper.AttendDayStdntMapper.selectByPk */ SELECT * FROM t_attend_day_stdnt WHERE edu_seq=#{eduSeq} and edu_dt=#{eduDt} and user_id=#{userId}
mapper.delete: /* com.educare.edu.comn.mapper.AttendDayStdntMapper.deleteByPk */ DELETE FROM t_attend_day_stdnt WHERE edu_seq=#{eduSeq} and edu_dt=#{eduDt} and user_id=#{userId}
